name: Clear and Hold
flavor: Combined Arms Doctrine — Petraeus's COIN method: secure the ground, then build on it. Reposition to hold key terrain and draw on local support.
summary: Up to 3 allied units each make 1 Move to secure ground, then draw 1 Doctrine card.

effects.text: Up to 3 different allied units each make 1 Move (clear and hold key terrain).
Then draw 1 Doctrine card (build on the secured ground).
